scripts.dev: corepack pnpm run docker:up && turbo run dev
scripts.dev:api: corepack pnpm run docker:up && turbo run dev --filter api
scripts.db:reset: docker compose --env-file packages/db/.env down -v && docker compose --env-file packages/db/.env up -d
scripts.start:prod:local: corepack pnpm run docker:up && corepack pnpm run docker:wait && turbo run start:prod
